description: Flagged PGA Tour ticket purchase as potentially lapsed without verifying completion status. Task due date was May 6; surfaced as a risk when David had already purchased tickets.
correction: David confirmed tickets are purchased. Frame past-due OmniFocus tasks as 'may be done — confirm?' rather than asserting them as open risks.
systemic_fix: When OmniFocus returns a task with a past due date, treat as potentially stale. Never assert 'this lapsed' — ask if it's been handled.
